generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for real-time speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for vehicle steering measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppEnabler
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation for speed control converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance LowerChassisLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower chassis layer for control components"
]

instance UpperChassisLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper chassis layer for autonomy components"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity containing sensors and actuators"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosting DT models and services"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for operator interaction"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for inter-system communication"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle system with Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis"
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, VedderESC, LowerChassisLayer, UpperChassisLayer, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing timeseries vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted, LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storage management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and report generation for system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC logic to DT for resource-constrained ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:provides OffloadACCAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state visualization for operator monitoring"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated report generation for system performance analysis"
]

instance OffloadACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading adaptive cruise control logic to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting desired speed of vehicle remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering emergency braking remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering commands from the DT to the physical twin, converted to motor voltage and servo control signals by the Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity, and synchronized clocks across components with 100 ms accuracy per 3GPP 22.185."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing), User Entity (UI), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-system and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for real-time ADAS control and monitoring, and design phase for ADAS development and validation as a cyber-physical experimentation facility."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 DDS for intra-system communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency, Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano onboard the vehicle; Digital Twin Entity components hosted on cloud servers; Data Storage external to vehicle in cloud-based SQL database."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework; ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I requirements; 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication latency."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with 100 ms latency requirement for real-time control; however, specific cybersecurity measures and safety protocols not detailed in the document."
]
